description: ApplicationStatus contains status information for the application

conditions.description: Conditions is a list of currently observed application conditions

controllerNamespace.description: ControllerNamespace indicates the namespace in which the application controller is located

health.description: Health contains information about the application's current health status

history.description: History contains information about the application's sync history

observedAt.description: ObservedAt indicates when the application state was updated without querying latest git state Deprecated: controller no longer updates ObservedAt field

operationState.description: OperationState contains information about any ongoing operations, such as a sync

reconciledAt.description: ReconciledAt indicates when the application state was reconciled using the latest git version

resourceHealthSource.description: ResourceHealthSource indicates where the resource health status is stored: inline if not set or appTree

resources.description: Resources is a list of Kubernetes resources managed by this application

sourceHydrator.description: SourceHydrator stores information about the current state of source hydration

sourceType.description: SourceType specifies the type of this application

sourceTypes.description: SourceTypes specifies the type of the sources included in the application

summary.description: Summary contains a list of URLs and container images used by this application

sync.description: Sync contains information about the application's current sync status
